description_long: This is a wrought iron-style metal fence section featuring vertical bars with pointed spearhead finials at the top. The top edge of the fence forms a gentle arch, with the central bars being the tallest and the height gradually decreasing toward the sides. The fence is constructed with two horizontal rails, one near the base and one just below the top, connecting the vertical bars. The vertical bars are evenly spaced and slender, giving the fence a secure yet visually open appearance. The black finish suggests durability and resistance to weather, making it suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or residential boundaries. The pointed finials add a decorative and deterrent function, discouraging climbing.
description: A black metal fence with an arched top and pointed spearhead finials, featuring evenly spaced vertical bars and two horizontal rails. The design is both decorative and functional, suitable for urban boundaries.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched top, pointed finials, and the full arrangement of vertical bars and horizontal rails.
description_view_1: Side profile view, revealing the thinness of the fence and the alignment of the vertical bars.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the arched top and pointed finials.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim profile and vertical alignment.
